schema: {"type":"record","name":"OrderValue","namespace":"com.example.kafkaavro.schema","doc":"Value schema for test-topic with comprehensive types including logical types, nested records, arrays, and maps","fields":[{"name":"amount","type":["null",{"type":"bytes","logicalType":"decimal","precision":10,"scale":2}],"default":null,"doc":"Order amount as decimal with 2 decimal places"},{"name":"active","type":"boolean","doc":"Order active status"},{"name":"tradeDate","type":["null",{"type":"int","logicalType":"date"}],"default":null,"doc":"Trade date as days since Unix epoch"},{"name":"createdAt","type":["null",{"type":"long","logicalType":"timestamp-millis"}],"default":null,"doc":"Creation timestamp in milliseconds since Unix epoch"},{"name":"executionTime","type":["null",{"type":"long","logicalType":"time-micros"}],"default":null,"doc":"Optional execution time in microseconds since midnight"},{"name":"tags","type":{"type":"array","items":"string"},"default":[],"doc":"Array of string tags"},{"name":"metadata","type":{"type":"map","values":"string"},"default":{},"doc":"Map of metadata key-value pairs"},{"name":"nestedRecord","type":["null",{"type":"record","name":"NestedData","fields":[{"name":"someField","type":"string","doc":"Example nested field"},{"name":"count","type":"int","default":0,"doc":"Example nested integer"}]}],"default":null,"doc":"Optional nested record"},{"name":"status","type":{"type":"enum","name":"OrderStatus","symbols":["PENDING","CONFIRMED","SHIPPED","DELIVERED","CANCELLED"]},"default":"PENDING","doc":"Order status enum"},{"name":"notes","type":["null","string"],"default":null,"doc":"Optional notes"}]}
